title: Implement admin-only resetMaintenanceFund backend function

requirements.text: Implement an admin-only `resetMaintenanceFund` function in the Motoko backend actor that resets the maintenance fund balance and related state, restricted to users with the admin role.
acceptanceCriteria: The function checks that the caller has the admin role; non-admins receive an error response
Calling the function as an admin resets the maintenance fund balance and clears or archives existing maintenance expense entries as appropriate
The function returns a success or error variant result

requirements.text: Wire the existing 'Reset Fund' admin button in the MaintenanceManagement frontend component to call the new `resetMaintenanceFund` backend function via a React Query mutation hook, displaying a success or error toast on completion.
acceptanceCriteria: A `useResetMaintenanceFund` mutation hook is added to frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts
The mutation calls the backend `resetMaintenanceFund` function via the actor
On success, relevant queries (maintenance fund data) are invalidated and a success toast is shown
On error, an error toast is shown
The Reset Fund button in MaintenanceManagement is disabled for non-admin users and shows a loading state while the mutation is in flight

constraints: All Motoko logic must remain in backend/main.mo — do not create additional actor files
Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
nonGoals: Adding new UI pages or tabs for maintenance management
Changing the maintenance fund data model beyond what is required for the reset operation
Implementing any other pending features not related to resetMaintenanceFund
